System Architecture

Precision hardware.
Intelligent software.

The SensIQ sensor mounts on any rotating machine in minutes and streams 3-axis vibration data to the cloud for continuous AI-powered analysis.

Isometric
Mount face
Top view
01

Mount in minutes

Compact aluminum enclosure (IP67) with M8 connector. Stud-mount or magnetic base directly on machine surfaces — no complex wiring or PLC integration required.

02

Continuous 3-axis capture

Captures X (Axial), Y (Horizontal), and Z (Vertical) velocity (mm/s) and acceleration (g) simultaneously at up to 32 kHz — plus temperature, RPM, and ambient sound.

03

Real-time FFT spectrum analysis

Fast Fourier Transform identifies bearing defect frequencies, imbalance, misalignment, and looseness signatures from the raw vibration signal automatically.

04

AI predictions & alerts

Baseline learning + ISO thresholds + anomaly detection flag degradation weeks before failure — alerts via WhatsApp, SMS, and email to the right person instantly.

Capabilities

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Built for reliability engineers and plant managers who need answers — not raw data dumps.

📡
Plant Status Overview

At-a-glance view of every machine colour-coded green, amber, and red by ISO velocity thresholds. Know which machines need attention in real time.

ISO 10816 / 20816
〰️
FFT Frequency Spectrum

Live and historical frequency plots across all three axes with up to 32 kHz sampling — wideband FFT for early bearing and gear fault visibility. Auto-annotated dominant peaks with harmonic relationships for fast fault identification.

32 kHz sampling
🔔
Smart AI Alerts

Configurable caution and danger thresholds per axis, per machine. WhatsApp, SMS, and email routing to ensure the right person is always notified first.

WhatsApp native
📈
Trend & History Analysis

Track vibration levels over days, weeks, and months. Correlate spikes to maintenance events. Watch gradual degradation trends before they become failures.

Unlimited history
🌡️
Environmental Monitoring

Simultaneous RPM, temperature, and ambient sound capture alongside vibration — giving full operational context to every single data point collected.

RPM · Temp · Sound
📋
Reports & Service Orders

Automated shift, daily, and weekly reports. Raise, assign, and close maintenance tickets directly from the dashboard in one unified workflow.

PDF · Excel · API
The Platform

The dashboard your team
will actually use.

sensiq.app/realtime-view
🎨

Three-zone severity bands

Green, amber, and red zones configurable per machine and axis — aligned to ISO standards or your own thresholds.

🔍

Click-to-FFT investigation

Click any point on the velocity trend to instantly see the FFT spectrum at that exact moment. Trace peaks to bearing BPFI, BPFO, BSF fault frequencies.

📊

Multi-axis simultaneous view

X, Y, and Z channels overlaid on a single spectrum with colour-coded traces and interactive tooltips showing exact frequency, amplitude, and timestamp.

🔧

Integrated service orders

Raise, assign, and close maintenance tickets directly from the alert view — one platform for monitoring and maintenance.

Industries

Built for every
rotating machine.

If it spins, we monitor it — across heavy industry, manufacturing, oil & gas, and utilities.

Manufacturing Plants

Keep production lines running. Monitor CNC spindles, cooling fans, conveyor drives, and compressors before they cause unplanned stoppages that erode OEE.

  • Motor & pump vibration monitoring
  • Cooling fan and blower health
  • Conveyor drive bearing condition
  • Compressor and hydraulic unit monitoring
  • Integration with existing CMMS/ERP
Explore Manufacturing →

Heavy Industry

Monitor crusher drives, conveyor motors, and kiln support rollers in mining, steel, and cement plants where unplanned stops cost millions per hour.

  • Crusher and mill drive monitoring
  • Kiln and rotary equipment health
  • High-temperature environments (IP67)
  • Multi-site deployment and management
  • Shift-level vibration reports
Explore Heavy Industry →

Oil, Gas & Petrochemicals

Monitor turbines, pumps, and compressors continuously. Prevent costly unplanned shutdowns and extend critical asset life across upstream and downstream operations.

  • Centrifugal & reciprocating pump monitoring
  • Compressor and turbine health
  • Remote facility monitoring via cloud
  • API 670 threshold compliance
  • Hazardous area sensor variants
Explore Oil & Gas →

Utilities & Infrastructure

Power plants, water treatment facilities, and HVAC systems — keep critical infrastructure running with continuous vibration monitoring and predictive maintenance.

  • Water pump and booster station health
  • Generator and turbine monitoring
  • HVAC fan and chiller motor condition
  • Cooling tower drive monitoring
  • 24/7 unattended remote monitoring
Explore Utilities →

Operators speak.
Engineers validate.

SensIQ caught a bearing degradation on our main cooling fan two weeks before it would have failed. The FFT peaks were clear as day. We replaced the bearing on a planned shutdown — avoided at least 4 hours of unplanned downtime.

Sensor Benchmarking
Product comparison

SensIQ Pro vs
IntelliVibe Ultra.

Side-by-side view of the capabilities that matter for predictive maintenance teams. Confirm final IntelliVibe Ultra figures against your vendor datasheet; SensIQ Pro is listed with our current shipping specification (32 kHz sampling).

CapabilitySensIQ Pro OURSIntelliVibe Ultra
Maximum sampling rate (triaxial)32 kHz — high-bandwidth capture for FFT and transientsLower typical max ODR on many wireless CM nodes; verify on latest datasheet
3-axis vibration (velocity & acceleration)✓ Continuous X · Y · Z✓ Triaxial vibration
Auxiliary sensing (temp, RPM, sound)✓ Included in one stream✓ Multi-parameter IoT sensor (vibration + temperature + sound + RPM + flux, per IntelliVibe positioning)
Edge-to-cloud analytics✓ SensIQ Realtime — trends, thresholds, FFT, historyIntelliVibe stack + partner cloud / mobile access
ISO-style severity bands & alerting✓ Per-machine, per-axis thresholds✓ Rule-based / ML alerting (deployment-dependent)
WhatsApp / SMS notifications✓ Native routing— Usually email / app; channel mix varies
Service orders inside the product✓ Raise, assign, close from dashboard— Typically external CMMS
Time to production deploymentUnder 2 weeks (typical)4–8 weeks (typical integration)

Based on the SensIQ Pro vs IntelliVibe Ultra — Comparison brief. Competitor capabilities can vary by SKU and firmware — confirm against the manufacturer’s latest datasheet before you standardize.

Competitive Analysis

How SensIQ stacks up.

Head-to-head FFT comparison on the same tapeline motor, same day. Real data from a live customer site.

ParameterSensIQ Realtime OURSIntellyVibeEmerson Piezo
3-axis simultaneous measurement✓ X · Y · Z live✓✓
Peak detection (12.77Hz, H-axis)✓ 2.4 mm/s3.4 mm/s2.75 mm/s
RPM · Temperature · Sound✓ Built-in— Limited— Add-on
Real-time cloud dashboard✓ Included✓— Enterprise only
WhatsApp / SMS alerting✓ Native——
Integrated service orders✓ Built-in——
Deployment timeUnder 2 weeks4–8 weeks6–12 weeks

FAQ

Common
questions.

Can't find what you're looking for? Our team is happy to help.


Contact Us →
The sensor measures RMS velocity (mm/s) and acceleration (m/s² or g) across three axes simultaneously — plus temperature, RPM, and sound level, giving full operational context alongside every vibration reading.
Yes. SensIQ works on any rotating machinery regardless of age. We measure vibration directly at the machine surface — no PLC integration, no compatibility constraints whatsoever.
Physical installation takes under 30 minutes per machine. Full system go-live — dashboard configuration, alert thresholds, and baseline learning — typically within 2 weeks.
Baseline learning + ISO threshold monitoring + bearing fault frequency detection (BPFI, BPFO, BSF, FTF). Alerts via email, SMS, or WhatsApp to the right person in real time.
On-device local storage and dual-SIM plus Ethernet failover. No data is lost — all measurements buffer locally and sync automatically once connectivity is restored.
Yes. REST API and webhooks push alerts and service orders directly into your existing CMMS or ERP. Out-of-the-box Excel and PDF exports also available.
